name: mob-forge
description: AI-authored GeckoLib mobs for Minecraft 1.20.2 (NeoForge). A Gradle/Java project wrapped as a Turborepo workspace member.

scripts.build: [ -x ./gradlew ] && ./gradlew build || echo 'mob-forge is not bootstrapped yet - run: pnpm setup-minecraft'
scripts.dev: [ -x ./gradlew ] && ./gradlew runClient || echo 'mob-forge is not bootstrapped yet - run: pnpm setup-minecraft'
